allow: Bash(sudo -S systemctl stop docker docker.socket containerd)

Bash(sudo -S apt-get remove -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin docker-compose docker.io docker-doc docker-compose-v2 podman-docker python3-docker python3-dockerpty python3-compose)
Bash(sudo -S apt-get purge -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin docker-ce-rootless-extras)
Bash(sudo -S apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl gnupg)
Bash(sudo -S apt-get install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin)

postgres.description: Database MCP — Consulta schemas, tabelas e dados no PostgreSQL (raw, staging, marts). Use antes de criar ou modificar qualquer modelo dbt.

filesystem.description: Filesystem MCP — Acessa logs do dbt (logs/dbt.log), SQL compilado (target/compiled/), seeds e arquivos do projeto.

git.description: Git MCP — Histórico de commits, diffs e blame dos modelos dbt. Use para rastrear o que mudou antes de modificar modelos existentes.

github.description: GitHub MCP — Gerencia issues, pull requests e revisões de código no repositório projetosdatabricksfree-png/Sports.
